markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Account Manager role at growthx.ai, including responsibilities, team structure, and hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Account Managers work on 4-5 accounts, focusing on content strategy, SEO, and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [The ideal candidate has 4+ years of experience, with a content-first background and SEO knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Current performance evaluation is qualitative; quantitative metrics are being developed](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Hiring process needs refinement, with plans to involve Managing Directors in future recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

## Topics

### Role Differentiation: Managing Editor vs. Account Manager

  - [Managing Editors:](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [Lead pods of 4-5 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Responsible for overall strategy and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Often more client-facing](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Account Managers:](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Support strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Conduct keyword and competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [Manage content workflows and generation](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Train and oversee writers](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [Focus on iterating and optimizing processes based on client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Team Structure and Evolution

  - [Recent shift to pod structure (December):](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [1 Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [1-2 Account Managers](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [\~2 Writers](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Support roles (copy editor, production)](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Currently have 9 Account Managers, with more starting soon](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Aiming for dedicated full-time support across pods](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

### Ideal Candidate Profile

  - [Content-first background with SEO knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [4+ years of experience (average 5-6 years)](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Intellectual curiosity and willingness to learn AI content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Experience with or interest in testing and experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Adaptable to fast-paced, changing startup environment](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Hiring Process and Assessments

  - [Video assessment submission](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [AI-powered initial profile screening (recently adjusted)](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Workable verbal and comprehension assessment](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Interview with Kyle (sometimes additional Managing Editor input)](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Plans to involve Managing Directors in future hiring](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

### Performance Evaluation

  - [Currently qualitative-based:](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [Account growth](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [Proactive problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [Ideation and innovation](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Developing more structured quantitative metrics](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Managing Directors to help refine evaluation process](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

### Training and Onboarding

  - [Recognized need for improved training programs](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Current resources: Notion documentation, standard operating procedures, Circle videos](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Plans to formalize and expand training syllabus](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine and formalize training program for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Develop quantitative performance metrics for Account Managers](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Involve Managing Directors in hiring process and pod management](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Review and potentially adjust Workable assessment process](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Implement more structured performance evaluation system](https://fathom.video/share/yu1u-CLpXX67bYEyeq-nUeT96xwiEPDJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
